textByHash.244064e298de872e466bdf7ebb538228f2770baf: Did you say the Grail? You are a Grail knight, yes? Well you'd better hurry. A Fisher King is in pain.
textByHash.bbac7f56a873e228dda57f3954795e4352827515: Go to where the six heads face, blow the whistle and away you go!
textByHash.50a1f11a1b66b4c4ab963740e58ff7ff8123fbbc: The six stone heads have appeared just recently in the world. They all face the point of realm crossing. Find where two of the heads face,
textByHash.4c5c51d5e34de04b5474835bad95ee43cb0ae5bb: and you should be able to pinpoint where it is.
textByHash.7dc6d7383f54021a7e25cd1028a3624e36932f58: The Fisher King is the owner and slave of the Grail...
textByHash.a7fcc425e78caea5573d9c920994a18b1f92a235: You don't know about the whistles yet? The whistles are easy.
textByHash.442e39de95e994d46dc59673850b8b042c51f0c4: You will need one to get to and from the Fisher King's realm. They reside in a haunted manor house in Misthalin, though you may not perceive them unless you carry something from the realm of the Fisher
textByHash.dc796a4ba92b756a8bf5db4c620aeb12f2c1929f: The realm of the Fisher King is not quite of this reality. It is of a reality very close to ours though... Where it is easiest to cross, THAT is a point of realm crossing.
